horoscope: You might repair or heal problem areas by sharing encouraging thoughts and ideas today, dear Aries. Still, with a minor challenging Venus-Pluto aspect at play, vulnerable spots and insecurities are more evident in your relationships. It may be difficult to confront issues directly with this transit. Mixed signals are likely. Aim to focus on ways to make improvements. In general, you’re striving toward more independence or a personal sense of accomplishment. As such, it's easy to feel motivated when keeping a dream related to your initiative, wellness, confidence, or personal plans in mind.

At times today, pre-existing problems in intimate relationships can be working close to the surface, dear Taurus, and they might interfere with your work and duties. If people have been overstepping their bounds, you can feel frustrated now. It's time to recognize the need for adjustments. Blocks to plans encountered now can likely lead to valuable refinements, and you may very well be gaining more than is immediately apparent. Fortunately, this week finds you feeling far more empowered and determined to work toward your dreams, reach a deeper level of self-understanding, and let go of heavy karmic weight. Tying up the loose ends in your life can be part of this, and it's rewarding.

Differences in spending, values, or respect in a relationship can be harder to accept in spots today, dear Gemini. You can be on the fence with money and valuables, and it's better to stay there temporarily until your confidence returns. You may need to make some adjustments to get back on track. It's too easy to focus on what's not working in your life, and a better use of your energy would be to work on straightening out problems and details. For best results, look for opportunities to make necessary edits and adjustments. Aim to learn from your trigger points if you're feeling resentful. Fortunately, your energy and motivation levels are building, and the problems you’ve avoided or the areas in which you’ve been procrastinating seem more manageable. You can also find it rewarding to immerse yourself in a cause or project.

With Venus in your sign in a minor challenging aspect with Pluto, dear Cancer, money matters and questions of ownership can be tricky issues, needing delicate handling. Alternatively, there can be doubts about a person in your life or an uncomfortable decision. Make adjustments to plans now for the best results. Aim to find a place of calm before you jump into anything. In truth, you’re more inclined to take the initiative or act from your intuition this week, and your interest in making positive changes can end up dominating. With a dream in mind, you can be especially expert at improving matters, especially with reputation, leadership skills, or building self-discipline.

Venus in your privacy sector forms a minor challenging aspect to Pluto today, dear Leo, and you get in touch with some of the hidden forces at work in your life that may be undermining your relationships. Fears and resentments can be at the root of discontent, and ghosts from the past may seem to crop up. Others don't readily let you have your way in spots today, which can be frustrating, but possibly a blessing in disguise. Slowing down can work to your benefit now. A concern that someone is disapproving or keeping something from you could also lead you to work on improving areas where you're feeling vulnerable. Fortunately, today and this week, you’re building the inspiration to grow, improve, and heal.

At times today, dear Virgo, you may wrestle with reminders of disappointments from your past or feelings of guilt. Try to find healthy ways to release your frustration, and make plans to address any dilemmas that might crop up in a step-by-step manner. Fortunately, you have more faith in your dreams today, which can fuel your motivation for a project or interest. Strong energy is with you for work or thinking done behind the scenes, away from distractions. You can feel quite committed once you feel motivated! There can be a breakthrough in research, as well as some fearlessness in tackling problem areas, both in relationships and on practical levels.

In the first half of today, there can be some resentments or fears that distract you from your priorities, dear Libra. If this is the case, try to replace negative thoughts with affirmations. It may be helpful to keep in mind that you can't please everyone all the time! Fortunately, a new layer of understanding and acceptance in a partnership can boost things up.  A relationship goal, ideal, or dream can very well drive you to improve your life. At the same time, you're grounded now, and taking some concrete steps toward achieving your goals can be especially satisfying.

The first half of the day is influenced by an awkward aspect between your ruler, Pluto, and Venus, dear Scorpio. There can be a tricky decision or dilemma as a result. You might crave more freedom on the one hand with Venus in your spirit sector, but emotions are complicated, as a good part of you wants to play things safe. Interactions can stir intense feelings, and something or someone might remind you of issues you'd prefer to forget. Even so, this gives you the chance to face and deal with sticky feelings. Fortunately, the more creative or inspiring your tasks are, the more productive you are today. You're in good shape for putting extra effort into a special project or pursuit. In fact, you can be quite motivated to make long-lasting, beneficial changes to your habits, duties, work, and routines now and this week. It can be quite rewarding to pour your energy into mastering a particular skill.

Today's Venus-Pluto transit can highlight some doubts that are difficult to ignore, dear Sagittarius. In fact, old resentments may emerge. There is a strong need for intimacy and a desire to control things, and these two things don't go together easily. Avoid overanalyzing, which can take you to frustrating places now. Instead, look for ways to learn from your resentment or anger. Fortunately, it's also a time when you're motivated to pursue certain projects, branch out, and express yourself creatively in concrete ways. Goals and dreams seem easier to reach with this attitude. You're determined to build more meaningful, authentic pursuits and connections.

At times today, your feelings can be overwhelming, dear Capricorn, or they might only be a little more difficult to understand. People may give off confusing or mixed signals, and while distracting, it's probably better to accept that things are temporarily out of sync and avoid jumping to conclusions. Fortunately, your energy levels rise with inspiration. As such, meaningful activities can be what takes you out of a slight emotional slump. You’re striving toward an improved emotional foundation, home life, and domestic world these days, and you can feel quite motivated to build them step by step.

At times today, you could face some limitations or blocks with Venus in a minor challenging aspect with Pluto in your sign, dear Aquarius. Creative energy is abundant when it's with you today, but there can be some concerns or worries that might undermine your good mood in spots. If you've recently been feeling put upon, you might recognize the imbalances more clearly now. However, your motivation levels are improving this week, and your personal interests are picking up steam. You’re ready to pursue a personal interest, goal, line of study, or connection more determinedly and with more self-discipline.

At times today, there may be some friction due to heightened sensitivity or touchiness, dear Pisces. Defensiveness and resistance are possible with Venus and Pluto forming an awkward aspect. If others are pushing your buttons, try to keep your cool. It makes sense to acknowledge insecurities or fears that emerge now, but avoid dwelling on problem areas. Fortunately, your confidence and motivation are increasing this week, particularly related to comfort, security, and money matters. You're more inspired to pursue prosperity with determination and commitment. Disciplining yourself feels far easier when you have a goal or dream in mind.
